name: workspace
description: Monorepo workspace for Altitutor apps and packages

scripts.checkall: turbo run lint && turbo run typecheck && turbo run test && turbo run build
scripts.db:types: pnpm exec supabase gen types typescript --local --schema public > packages/shared/src/supabase/generated.ts && pnpm --filter @altitutor/shared run build
scripts.db:committypes: pnpm exec supabase db reset && supabase db lint --local --level=error --fail-on error && pnpm db:types && git add packages/shared/src/supabase/generated.ts && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: regenerate types')
